fields.name: site_description
fields.prompt: Write a neutral one-paragraph description of the inspected site from the summary. Do not assess risk here.

fields.name: hazards_identified
fields.prompt: State the hazard implied by the finding and reference the relevant standard. Be specific and factual; cite only the standard provided.

fields.name: compliance_assessment
fields.prompt: Assess whether the finding meets the cited requirement. Note the requirement, the observed condition, and whether it is compliant or non-compliant. Cite only the standard provided.
